rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or declared as helpers.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes; use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: When diagnostics report unresolved references, trace the first invalid identifier on the same line and resolve it by correcting the reference or removing the clause.
AGREE contracts must only reference visible AADL features or helpers declared within the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assign for implementation-level output features or declared auxiliary variables, not for guarantee statements.
Ensure all identifiers in guarantee expressions are either AADL features or previously declared eq helpers.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses.
Do not place assume/guarantee contracts in component type scopes when they reference implementation-level ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about missing entity references
AGREE validator diagnostics about connection end resolution
